title: Complex State with useReducer
description: Manage objects and multiple values with a reducer.

slides.title: State as an Object 📦
Using the Form Reducer
slides.content: Here's how you'd use it in a component:

quizData.question: With useReducer, you must always return a new object when state is an object; mutating the state object directly will cause bugs.
quizData.explanation: Yes, just like with useState, you must treat state as immutable.
